name: Almond Bread - Machine
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Almond paste (sliced into 1/8 inch slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. If your bread maker's instructions call for placing the yeast in the pan first and adding the liquid ingredients last, pour the milk into the baking pan of your ABM and break in the egg.
2. If the butter is not soft, cut it into small chunks to ensure its blending into the dough, then add it to the liquids.
3. Next, add the almond paste (sliced so it will blend better).
4. Measure in the flour, brown sugar, and salt, and add the yeast as directed for your bread maker.
5. Use your machine's full cycle with this bread, but the quick cycle is preferable. If a light color setting is available, use it as well.
6. As soon as the bread has finished baking, remove it from the machine and close the cover again.
7. Ease the loaf from the pan. Combine equal parts corn syrup and warm water in a small bowl for brushing the top of the loaf.
8. Brush the glaze over the loaf using a pastry brush, then sprinkle slivered almonds on top.
9. Return the bread gently back to its pan and place it briefly back into the electronic oven to allow the glaze to dry slightly.
